arts.ttl: Djuric sidelined: Monza striker faces potential long-term Injury
arts.sum: Monza's attacking plans have been dealt a significant blow as Milan Djuric, their joint top scorer in Serie A, has suffered an injury during training. The post Djuric sidelined: Monza striker faces potential long-term Injury appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: “Maldini needs to learn to manage situations”: Nesta prepares Monza for Lecce clash
arts.sum: Monza head coach held a press conference to discuss the upcoming match against Lecce, scheduled for Sunday at the Via del Mare. The post “Maldini needs to learn to manage situations”: Nesta prepares Monza for Lecce clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.
